
CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__BSD_StucklistenArticleExtension](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) primary key,
	[ArticleId] [int] NOT NULL,
	[ArticleNumber] [nvarchar](200) NULL,
	[ArticleDesignation] [nvarchar](200) NULL,
	[BomVersion] [nvarchar](50) NULL,
	[BomStatus] [nvarchar](100) NULL,
	[BomValidFrom] DATETIME NULL,
	[LastUpdateTime] DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE(),
	[LastUpdateUserId] [int] NULL,
	[upsize_ts] [timestamp] NULL
) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
